name: send_message
description: Send a text message to a Messenger user. Specify the recipient user ID and message text to deliver instant notifications within the Messenger app.

parameters.name: recipient_id
parameters.description: The user ID of the Messenger recipient.

parameters.name: message_text
parameters.description: The text content of the message to send.
parameters.example: Hello! How can I help you today?

message.text: Hello! How can I help you today?
